prompt: Two-tone typographic logo on black background. The word 'MM' is displayed in electric cyan (#00E3FF) bold geometric sans-serif, and directly next to it 'AGENCY.' is displayed in clean white, same typeface but regular weight. The two parts sit on the same baseline, creating a striking two-color wordmark. The period at the end is also in cyan. The typeface is modern geometric — think Montserrat or Gilroy style, with perfectly round O's and uniform strokes. Generous letter-spacing between all characters. No icon, no symbol, no graphic — purely typographic. Clean, premium, contemporary digital agency aesthetic. Vector sharp, flat design, centered on pure black canvas.
